title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Boehringer Ingelheim India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Boehringer Ingelheim India
jsonLd.description:
Boehringer Ingelheim India has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Surat office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Boehringer Ingelheim India:
Boehringer Ingelheim India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Boehringer Ingelheim India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
